text: Hey all, dropping my trailer in Tuscaloosa Friday, home for the week. Sunday dinner at Dale and Tammy's still on?
Yes! Sunday Nov 2, come by around 2. I'm doing the brisket and greens.
Game's at 2:30 too, Bama vs LSU. I'll have it on in the den. Anthony bring the cooler?
I got the cooler and a case of Cokes. Janelle you driving down from Nashville?
Yep! Leaving Saturday morning, staying through Monday. Can't wait to see you Dad. I'll bring a pecan pie.
Perfect. Anybody talked to Mama Jean? She wasn't sure about the time.
I'll call her tonight, she likes the phone better. I'll swing by and pick her up Sunday on my way.
Roll Tide. Good having everyone over today. Drive safe back to the road Anthony.
Dad you actually home this week or rolling through? Want to grab breakfast just us before Sunday.
Home til next Monday. Yes, Saturday morning, the diner on 11th. My treat.
On the road now, see you in the morning. Love you!
Hey little brother, need anything from the store before Sunday? Tammy's making a list.
Just ice for the cooler, I got the rest. Want me to bring the folding chairs for the game?
Bring 'em. Kickoff 2:30, get here by 1 so we beat traffic with Mama Jean.
You back in Birmingham? I'm laid over til Thursday. Beers and watch the Tide preview?
Home all week Ray. Come by Thursday night. How'd that reefer load to Memphis pay out?
Decent miles. Roll Tide tomorrow brother, enjoy the family dinner.
Anthony do you still eat the sweet potato casserole or has Janelle got you on the healthy kick? lol
Make the casserole Tammy, doctor can wait til Monday. See y'all Sunday at 1.
Anthony, Janelle said you're home this week. She's excited. Tell Dale and Tammy I said hello.
Will do, Carol. She's driving down Saturday. Glad she's got the time off.
Dropping the trailer in Tuscaloosa Friday, home for the week. Sunday dinner still on? (wk 1)
How was the office party sweetheart? [10/06]
Tide covered easy. Told you. [10/06]
Dinner Sunday at 6, bringing Mama Jean. [10/06]
Ice on I-40 east of Knoxville, take it slow. [10/06]

Drive safe Daddy, call me when you park. [10/13]
